jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Rapido
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
